title: Home | Polyglot Dev App
description: Home page for the Polyglot Dev App. Explore Atlas, Course, and Meta modes from the left navigation.

content.text: The Polyglot Developer Atlas is built to help you navigate multiple programming environments simultaneously. Whether you are a systems engineer moving to web development, or a scripter moving to low-level memory management, this tool provides the bridges you need.

In Atlas mode, you can select one or two programming languages from the top bar to see side-by-side comparisons of syntax, logic, and memory management. It acts as a live reference sheet for daily coding work.

Course mode transforms the atlas into a structured learning roadmap. It guides you through the fundamental concepts of programming step by step, ensuring you understand the why behind the syntax in every language.
Meta mode collects app-level references, showcases, and supporting material around how the atlas itself is organized.
1. Use the mode selector in the center of the navbar to switch between Project, Atlas, Course, and Meta.
2. Select your languages in the selector bar to trigger comparison views.
3. Use the left sidebar to change pages and the right sidebar to focus on specific topics within a page.
4. Toggle the sidebars using the edge buttons to clear the view for deep code reading.
